subject: [PATCH v3 0/3] fuse: fix missing barriers in io-uring init

reviews.author: Miklos Szeredi
reviews.summary: Identified and fixed a missing barrier in io-uring initialization. Approved the patch series for application.
reviews.raw_body:
On Thu, 16 Jul 2026 at 20:31, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> These are pre-existing issues Sashiko reported [1] on the fuse zerocopy
> series.

Applied, thanks.


Miklos

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch series addresses missing barriers in the io-uring initialization of the fuse filesystem, fixing issues reported by Sashiko. The patches introduce release/acquire semantics for fch->initialized and publish io-uring queues with release semantics.
